description_long: This is a large, three-seater sofa upholstered in a dark brown leather or leather-like material, featuring a plush and overstuffed appearance. The seat and back cushions are generously padded, with visible seams and a slightly wrinkled texture that suggests softness and comfort. Two light-colored throw pillows are placed on the left side, providing a visual contrast to the darker upholstery. The armrests are wide, padded, and integrated into the overall form, matching the sofa's substantial and inviting silhouette. The backrest is segmented into three sections, each corresponding to a seat, and the base of the sofa extends close to the ground, with no visible legs. The overall design is modern and functional, suitable for both indoor and sheltered outdoor urban environments.
description: A large, dark brown leather sofa with plush, segmented cushions and two light throw pillows, featuring wide padded armrests and a low base.
description_view_0: Front view showing three seat and back cushions, two light throw pillows on the left, and wide padded armrests.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the sofa's depth, thick armrest, and the placement of the throw pillows.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous, slightly curved backrest and the sofa's low profile with no visible legs.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the sofa's length, the right armrest, and the arrangement of the seat and back cushions.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three large, attached seat cushions and three matching back cushions, all uniform in size; two loose throw pillows on the left side.
attribute_armrest_style: Wide, padded armrests at both ends, slightly rounded and at the same height as the seat back, integrated into the sofa's form.
attribute_leg_design: Legs are not visible; the base appears to rest directly on the floor, suggesting a hidden or recessed leg design.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, segmented backrest with three padded sections, each aligned with a seat, continuous across the width.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid dark brown leather with a smooth, slightly wrinkled texture and visible seam lines; no decorative stitching or patterned detailing.
